name: hud_ui_panel_set_text_fmt
description: HudUiPanel::SetTextFmt formats text from stack varargs, clears the buffer for null format, skips unchanged text, optionally updates centered extents, invalidates through the panel vtable, and refreshes the cached copy.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiTextLabel::UpdateTextExtents, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

Current source shares the SetTextFmtV implementation for functional behavior; Binary Ninja shows the original varargs body in HudUiPanel::SetTextFmt itself, so byte-safe shape belongs with the panel/text class pass.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SetTextFmt@HudUiPanel@@QAAXPBDZZ at 0x4bb540 still fails: 140 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 12 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 147 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows null-format clearing with rep stosd, _vsnprintf formatting from the stack varargs, strncmp against the cached text, optional HudUiTextLabel::UpdateTextExtents when centerText is set, virtual Invalidate dispatch, dirty flag update, and strncpy to the cache.
The native panel formatting smoke validates formatted update, unchanged-text skip, null clear, SetText behavior, and the shared SetTextFmtV va_list path.
